sentences.formal: 你昨天發給我的簡報我看完了，整體方向不錯。
sentences.colloquial: 你尋日send畀我嗰份deck我睇完喇，整體方向唔錯。
sentences.en: I've read the deck you sent me yesterday — the overall direction is good.

sentences.formal: 謝謝！有什麼地方需要修改嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒！有冇邊度需要改呀？
sentences.en: Thanks! Is there anything that needs changing?

sentences.formal: 第二頁的圖表太密了，建議拆開兩頁，重點會清楚一些。
sentences.colloquial: 第二頁個chart太密喇，建議拆開兩頁，重點會清楚啲。
sentences.en: The chart on page two is too dense — split it across two pages so the key points are clearer.

sentences.formal: 明白，那第五頁的數據要不要更新到最新一季？
sentences.colloquial: 明白，咁第五頁嗰啲data使唔使update到最新一季呀？
sentences.en: Got it. Should I update the data on page five to the latest quarter?

sentences.formal: 要，客戶一定會問最新數字。另外結論部分可以再直接一點。
sentences.colloquial: 要呀，客戶實會問最新數字㗎。另外結論嗰part可以再直接啲。
sentences.en: Yes — the client will definitely ask for the latest numbers. Also make the conclusion more direct.

sentences.formal: 好的，我把建議放在第一句，然後才解釋原因。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，我將個建議放喺第一句，然後先解釋原因。
sentences.en: Okay, I'll put the recommendation in the first sentence and explain the reasoning after.

sentences.formal: 對，就是這樣。字體也要統一用公司範本，現在有兩種字體。
sentences.colloquial: 啱喇，就係咁。字體都要統一用公司template，而家有兩種字體。
sentences.en: Exactly. And unify the fonts with the company template — there are two different fonts right now.

sentences.formal: 抱歉，我從舊檔案複製的時候沒有留意。
sentences.colloquial: 唔好意思，我copy舊file嗰陣冇為意。
sentences.en: Sorry, I didn't notice when I copied from the old file.

sentences.formal: 小事而已。你明天中午前給我修訂版，可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 小事啫。你聽日晏晝之前畀個修訂版我，得唔得？
sentences.en: It's a small thing. Can you get me the revised version by noon tomorrow?

sentences.formal: 沒問題，我今晚會改好。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，我今晚會改好佢。
sentences.en: No problem, I'll have it fixed tonight.

sentences.formal: 不好意思，七樓那部打印機又卡紙了，你可以來看看嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 唔好意思，七樓嗰部printer又卡紙呀，你可唔可以嚟睇睇？
sentences.en: Sorry to bother you — the printer on the seventh floor is jammed again, can you come take a look?

sentences.formal: 又卡紙？你有打開機蓋把紙拿出來嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 又卡紙？你有冇打開個蓋攞返張紙出嚟呀？
sentences.en: Jammed again? Did you open the cover and pull the paper out?

sentences.formal: 拿過了，但是屏幕還是顯示錯誤，完全打印不了。
sentences.colloquial: 攞過喇，但係個mon仲係顯示error，完全print唔到。
sentences.en: I did, but the screen still shows an error and it won't print at all.

sentences.formal: 明白，我十分鐘後上來。你急著打印什麼？
sentences.colloquial: 明白，我十分鐘後上嚟。你趕住print啲咩呀？
sentences.en: Got it, I'll come up in ten minutes. What do you urgently need to print?

sentences.formal: 三點開會用的文件，三十份，每份十頁。
sentences.colloquial: 三點開會用嘅文件，三十份，每份十頁。
sentences.en: Documents for the three o'clock meeting — thirty copies, ten pages each.

sentences.formal: 那不如你先把檔案傳到五樓那部打印機，那部沒有問題。
sentences.colloquial: 咁不如你send個file去五樓嗰部printer先，嗰部冇事。
sentences.en: Then send the file to the fifth-floor printer first — that one's working fine.

sentences.formal: 好主意，但是我不知道怎樣新增那部打印機。
sentences.colloquial: 好主意，但係我唔識點add嗰部printer喎。
sentences.en: Good idea, but I don't know how to add that printer.

sentences.formal: 在設定裏選「新增打印機」，然後輸入五零一這個編號就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 喺settings度揀「新增printer」，然後入五零一呢個號碼就得㗎喇。
sentences.en: In settings choose 'add printer,' then enter the number five-zero-one and you're set.

sentences.formal: 找到了，正在打印。那七樓那部呢？
sentences.colloquial: 搵到喇，print緊喇。咁七樓嗰部呢？
sentences.en: Found it — it's printing now. What about the seventh-floor one?

sentences.formal: 我下午來修理，應該是滾軸老化，可能要換零件。
sentences.colloquial: 我下晝嚟整，應該係個roller老化，可能要換零件。
sentences.en: I'll fix it this afternoon — probably a worn roller, it might need a new part.

sentences.formal: 麻煩你了，謝謝！
sentences.colloquial: 麻煩晒你，唔該！
sentences.en: Sorry for the trouble — thanks!

sentences.formal: 聽說你下星期五是最後一天，真的捨不得你。
sentences.colloquial: 聽講你下個禮拜五last day喎，真係唔捨得你。
sentences.en: I heard next Friday is your last day — we'll really miss you.

sentences.formal: 是啊，在這裏六年了，走的時候一定會哭。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，喺度六年喇，走嗰陣實喊㗎。
sentences.en: Yeah, six years here — I'll definitely cry when I leave.

sentences.formal: 我們星期四晚上幫你辦歡送會，你有想吃的東西嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 我哋禮拜四晚幫你搞farewell，你有冇嘢想食呀？
sentences.en: We're throwing you a farewell on Thursday night — anything you'd like to eat?

sentences.formal: 不如去樓下那家泰國菜？大家都喜歡。
sentences.colloquial: 不如去樓下嗰間泰國菜？個個都鍾意。
sentences.en: How about the Thai place downstairs? Everyone likes it.

sentences.formal: 好，我訂八點的位子，大約十二個人。
sentences.colloquial: 好，我book八點嘅位，大概十二個人。
sentences.en: Great, I'll book a table for eight o'clock, about twelve people.

sentences.formal: 謝謝你們。其實我只是轉去對面街的公司，隨時可以一起吃午飯。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒你哋。其實我只係轉去對面街嗰間公司啫，隨時可以一齊食lunch。
sentences.en: Thanks, everyone. I'm only moving to the company across the street — we can still grab lunch anytime.

sentences.formal: 那就好！新工作是同一個範疇嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 咁就好啦！新工係咪同一個範疇㗎？
sentences.en: That's good! Is the new job in the same field?

sentences.formal: 差不多，不過職級升了一級，薪水也好一點。
sentences.colloquial: 差唔多，不過職級升咗一級，人工又好啲。
sentences.en: Pretty similar, but one grade up and slightly better pay.

sentences.formal: 恭喜！記得留下你的私人電話，大家保持聯絡。
sentences.colloquial: 恭喜晒！記得留低你私人電話，大家keep住聯絡呀。
sentences.en: Congratulations! Leave us your personal number so we can keep in touch.

sentences.formal: 一定會，星期四見！
sentences.colloquial: 實會啦，禮拜四見！
sentences.en: Definitely — see you Thursday!

sentences.formal: 客戶剛剛通知，提案的死線由星期五提前到星期三。
sentences.colloquial: 客戶啱啱通知，個proposal嘅deadline由禮拜五提前到禮拜三喎。
sentences.en: The client just told us the proposal deadline has moved up from Friday to Wednesday.

sentences.formal: 星期三？那只剩下兩天，時間很緊。
sentences.colloquial: 禮拜三？咁咪淨返兩日，好趕喎。
sentences.en: Wednesday? That leaves only two days — that's really tight.

sentences.formal: 是，所以想問你們今晚和明晚可不可以加班趕一趕。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，所以想問你哋今晚聽晚可唔可以開OT趕一趕。
sentences.en: Yes — so I want to ask if you can all work overtime tonight and tomorrow night to push it through.

sentences.formal: 可以，不過財務部分要等會計部明天才給數據。
sentences.colloquial: 得，不過財務嗰part要等會計部聽日先畀到data。
sentences.en: Sure, but the finance section needs data from accounting, which only comes tomorrow.

sentences.formal: 那你先做市場分析那部分，數據一到就補上。
sentences.colloquial: 咁你做住市場分析嗰part先，啲data一到就補返上去。
sentences.en: Then work on the market analysis first and slot the data in as soon as it arrives.

sentences.formal: 明白。加班的晚飯公司會報銷嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。開OT嘅晚飯公司會唔會報銷㗎？
sentences.en: Got it. Will the company reimburse dinner when we work overtime?

sentences.formal: 會，每人上限一百二十元，記得保留收據。
sentences.colloquial: 會，每人上限一百二十蚊，記得留返張單。
sentences.en: Yes, up to one hundred and twenty dollars each — remember to keep your receipts.

sentences.formal: 好。趕完這一次，可以補假嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 好。趕完呢一次，有冇得補假呀？
sentences.en: Okay. After this crunch, can we take time off in lieu?

sentences.formal: 可以，交了提案之後每人補半天假。辛苦大家了。
sentences.colloquial: 得，交咗個proposal之後每人補返半日假。辛苦晒大家。
sentences.en: Yes, half a day off in lieu each once the proposal is in. Thanks for the hard work.

sentences.formal: 沒辦法了，做完這一單，大家去吃一頓好的吧！
sentences.colloquial: 冇計啦，做完呢單嘢，大家去食餐勁嘅啦！
sentences.en: Can't be helped — once this one's done, let's all go for a proper feast!

sentences.formal: 這家公司上一季度的業績怎樣？
sentences.colloquial: 呢間公司上個季度嘅業績點呀？
sentences.en: How did this company do last quarter?

sentences.formal: 收入按年增長百分之十五，超出預期。
sentences.colloquial: 收入按年升咗百分之十五，好過預期。
sentences.en: Revenue grew fifteen percent year-on-year — better than expected.

sentences.formal: 利潤率呢？
sentences.colloquial: 啲margin呢？
sentences.en: And margins?

sentences.formal: 毛利率維持在百分之四十左右。
sentences.colloquial: Gross margin維持喺百分之四十度。
sentences.en: Gross margin held at around forty percent.

sentences.formal: 管理層對下半年有什麼看法？
sentences.colloquial: 管理層對下半年有咩睇法呀？
sentences.en: What does management think about the second half?

sentences.formal: 他們比較樂觀，計劃擴充東南亞市場。
sentences.colloquial: 佢哋比較樂觀，打算擴充東南亞市場。
sentences.en: They're fairly optimistic — planning to expand in Southeast Asia.

sentences.formal: 風險方面要注意什麼？
sentences.colloquial: 風險方面要留意啲咩？
sentences.en: What should we watch on the risk side?

sentences.formal: 主要是成本上升和匯率波動。
sentences.colloquial: 主要係成本上升同埋匯率波動。
sentences.en: Mainly rising costs and currency swings.

sentences.formal: 好，下星期向投資委員會匯報。
sentences.colloquial: 好，下星期上IC匯報。
sentences.en: Good — we'll take it to the investment committee (IC) next week.

sentences.formal: 我今晚把報告發給你。
sentences.colloquial: 我今晚send份報告畀你。
sentences.en: I'll send you the report tonight.

sentences.formal: 今天大市怎樣？恒生指數是升還是跌？
sentences.colloquial: 今日個市點呀？恒指升定跌呀？
sentences.en: How's the market today? Is the Hang Seng up or down?

sentences.formal: 早上升了百分之二，下午回吐，現在只升三百多點。
sentences.colloquial: 朝早升咗百分之二，下晝回落，而家淨係升三百幾點。
sentences.en: It was up two percent in the morning but pulled back in the afternoon — now it's only up three-hundred-odd points.

sentences.formal: 資金好像在板塊輪動，由科技股轉向銀行股。
sentences.colloquial: 啲資金好似rotate緊，由科技股轉去銀行股。
sentences.en: Money seems to be rotating — out of tech stocks and into banks.

sentences.formal: 是啊。你有沒有看到那隻電動車股？今天早上裂口高開百分之八。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀。你有冇睇到嗰隻電動車股？今朝一開市就gap up咗百分之八。
sentences.en: Yeah. Did you see that EV stock? It gapped up eight percent at the open this morning.

sentences.formal: 為什麼升得那麼急？
sentences.colloquial: 做咩升得咁急㗎？
sentences.en: Why did it jump so sharply?

sentences.formal: 昨晚公布業績，收入超出市場預期百分之二十。
sentences.colloquial: 尋晚出咗業績，收入beat咗市場預期百分之二十。
sentences.en: Results came out last night — revenue beat market expectations by twenty percent.

sentences.formal: 交易部的同事怎麼看？現在追入會不會太遲？
sentences.colloquial: Desk啲同事點睇呀？而家追入會唔會太遲？
sentences.en: What does the desk think? Is it too late to chase it now?

sentences.formal: 他們覺得短線已經超買，不如等回調再考慮。
sentences.colloquial: 佢哋覺得短線已經overbought，不如等佢回吓先再諗。
sentences.en: They think it's overbought short term — better to wait for a pullback before deciding.

sentences.formal: 有道理。那我先放進觀察名單。
sentences.colloquial: 有道理喎。咁我擺入個watchlist先。
sentences.en: Fair enough — I'll put it on the watchlist for now.

sentences.formal: 好，收市後我把圖表發給你。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，收咗市我send個chart畀你。
sentences.en: Sure — I'll send you the chart after the close.

sentences.formal: 謝謝你抽時間見我們。先談談今年的收入趨勢吧。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒你抽時間見我哋。不如先講吓今年嘅收入趨勢吖。
sentences.en: Thanks for making time to see us. Let's start with this year's revenue trend.

sentences.formal: 上半年收入按年增長百分之十二，主要來自大灣區的新客戶。
sentences.colloquial: 上半年收入按年升咗百分之十二，主要嚟自大灣區啲新客。
sentences.en: First-half revenue grew twelve percent year-on-year, mainly from new customers in the Greater Bay Area.

sentences.formal: 不錯。成本方面有壓力嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 幾好喎。成本方面有冇壓力呀？
sentences.en: Not bad. Any pressure on costs?

sentences.formal: 有的，人工和租金都在上升，所以毛利率收窄了兩個百分點。
sentences.colloquial: 有呀，人工同租金都升緊，所以gross margin收窄咗兩個百分點。
sentences.en: Yes — wages and rent are both rising, so gross margin narrowed by two percentage points.

sentences.formal: 你們打算怎樣應對？
sentences.colloquial: 咁你哋打算點應對呀？
sentences.en: How do you plan to deal with that?

sentences.formal: 我們正把部分後勤職能搬到深圳，預計明年可以節省百分之八的營運成本。
sentences.colloquial: 我哋而家搬緊部分back office去深圳，預計明年慳返百分之八嘅營運成本。
sentences.en: We're moving part of the back office to Shenzhen — that should save eight percent in operating costs next year.

sentences.formal: 擴充計劃呢？聽說你們想進軍新加坡。
sentences.colloquial: 咁擴充計劃呢？聽講你哋想擴去新加坡。
sentences.en: And the expansion plan? We hear you want to enter Singapore.

sentences.formal: 對，目標是明年第二季開設辦事處，初期投資大約一千萬港元。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，目標係明年第二季開office，初期投資大概一千萬港紙。
sentences.en: Right — we aim to open an office in the second quarter next year, with an initial investment of around ten million Hong Kong dollars.

sentences.formal: 明白。下一步我們會做財務盡職調查，下星期把資料清單發給你們。
sentences.colloquial: 明白。下一步我哋會做財務DD，下星期send個資料list畀你哋。
sentences.en: Understood. Next we'll do financial due diligence — we'll send you the document list next week.

sentences.formal: 沒問題，數據室已經準備好了。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，個data room已經準備好晒。
sentences.en: No problem — the data room is all ready.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想開一個綜合戶口。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想開個綜合戶口。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to open an integrated account.

sentences.formal: 好的，請先取一個籌號，帶齊證件在那邊等叫號。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，唔該攞個籌先，帶齊證件喺嗰邊等叫號。
sentences.en: Sure — please take a ticket first, and wait over there with your documents until your number is called.

sentences.formal: 需要什麼文件？
sentences.colloquial: 要咩文件㗎？
sentences.en: What documents do I need?

sentences.formal: 護照或身份證，還有最近三個月的住址證明，例如水電費單。
sentences.colloquial: 護照或者身份證，仲有最近三個月嘅住址證明，例如水電費單。
sentences.en: Passport or ID card, plus proof of address from the last three months — a utility bill, for example.

sentences.formal: 銀行月結單可以當住址證明嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 銀行月結單當唔當到住址證明呀？
sentences.en: Does a bank statement count as address proof?

sentences.formal: 可以，只要有你的姓名和地址就可以了。
sentences.colloquial: 得呀，只要有你個名同地址就得。
sentences.en: Yes — as long as it shows your name and address.

sentences.formal: 我還想開通網上銀行。
sentences.colloquial: 我仲想開埋網上銀行。
sentences.en: I'd also like to set up online banking.

sentences.formal: 開戶時可以一併登記，之後用手機應用程式做認證就可以了。
sentences.colloquial: 開戶嗰陣可以一齊登記埋，之後用個app做個認證就得㗎喇。
sentences.en: We can register that when you open the account — then you just verify it in the mobile app.

sentences.formal: 大約要等多久？
sentences.colloquial: 大概要等幾耐呀？
sentences.en: Roughly how long is the wait?

sentences.formal: 現在你前面有八個人，大約要等二十分鐘。
sentences.colloquial: 而家你前面有八個人，大約要等二十分鐘。
sentences.en: There are eight people ahead of you — about a twenty-minute wait.

sentences.formal: 張先生，謝謝你安排這次電話會議。我們想再談談估值。
sentences.colloquial: 張生，唔該你安排呢個call。我哋想再傾吓個valuation。
sentences.en: Mr Cheung, thanks for setting up this call. We'd like to discuss valuation again.

sentences.formal: 沒問題。你們上次出價八億，我們的底線是十億，差距還是很大。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題。你哋上次出價八億，我哋條底線係十億，個gap仲係好大。
sentences.en: No problem. Your last offer was eight hundred million; our floor is one billion — the gap is still wide.

sentences.formal: 根據我們的盡職調查結果，八億五千萬已經是相當進取的估值。
sentences.colloquial: 根據我哋DD嘅結果，八億五千萬已經係好aggressive嘅估值。
sentences.en: Based on our due diligence findings, eight hundred and fifty million is already quite an aggressive valuation.

sentences.formal: 如果九億五千萬，我們可以考慮。
sentences.colloquial: 如果九億五千萬，我哋可以考慮吓。
sentences.en: At nine hundred and fifty million, we could consider it.

sentences.formal: 我們最多可以提高到九億，但條件是要有六十天的獨家談判期。
sentences.colloquial: 我哋最多去到九億，不過條件係要六十日exclusivity。
sentences.en: We can go up to nine hundred million at most — but on condition of sixty days' exclusivity.

sentences.formal: 六十天太長了，四十五天吧。
sentences.colloquial: 六十日太長喇，四十五日啦。
sentences.en: Sixty days is too long — let's say forty-five.

sentences.formal: 可以，但時間表要收緊，目標是九月底簽署買賣協議。
sentences.colloquial: 得，不過個timeline要收緊，目標係九月底sign SPA。
sentences.en: Fine — but the timeline has to tighten: the target is signing the SPA by the end of September.

sentences.formal: 沒問題。修訂後的條款書由誰負責？
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題。修訂版嘅term sheet邊個負責呀？
sentences.en: No problem. Who's handling the revised term sheet?

sentences.formal: 我們的律師起草，明天中午之前發給你們。
sentences.colloquial: 我哋啲律師起草，聽日晏晝之前send畀你哋。
sentences.en: Our lawyers will draft it — we'll send it over by noon tomorrow.

sentences.formal: 好，收到後我們內部審閱，再約下一次會議。
sentences.colloquial: 好，收到之後我哋內部review完，再約下一個call。
sentences.en: Good — once we receive it we'll review internally, then set up the next call.

sentences.formal: 謝謝你安排今天的實地考察，我們想先看生產線。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該你安排今日嚟實地考察，我哋想睇生產線先。
sentences.en: Thanks for arranging today's site visit — we'd like to see the production line first.

sentences.formal: 沒問題，這邊請。這條線今年剛剛升級，自動化程度高了很多。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，呢邊請。呢條線今年啱啱升級完，自動化程度高咗好多。
sentences.en: No problem, this way please. This line was just upgraded this year — it's far more automated now.

sentences.formal: 現在的產能利用率大概是多少？
sentences.colloquial: 而家嘅產能利用率大概係幾多呀？
sentences.en: What's the current capacity utilisation rate roughly?

sentences.formal: 旺季大約百分之八十五，淡季七成左右。
sentences.colloquial: 旺季大約百分之八十五，淡季七成度啦。
sentences.en: About eighty-five percent in peak season, around seventy percent off-peak.

sentences.formal: 最大的五個客戶佔營業額多少？我們比較關注集中度風險。
sentences.colloquial: 最大嗰五個客戶佔營業額幾多？我哋幾關注集中度風險。
sentences.en: How much of revenue do the top five customers account for? We're quite focused on concentration risk.

sentences.formal: 大約四成，比三年前低，因為我們刻意分散了客戶群。
sentences.colloquial: 大概四成，低過三年前，因為我哋特登分散咗個客戶群。
sentences.en: Around forty percent — lower than three years ago, because we deliberately diversified the customer base.

sentences.formal: 明白。存貨周轉天數呢？倉庫看起來相當滿。
sentences.colloquial: 明白。存貨周轉日數呢？個倉睇落幾滿喎。
sentences.en: I see. What about inventory days? The warehouse looks quite full.

sentences.formal: 大約六十天，最近為了應付一張大訂單，提前準備了貨。
sentences.colloquial: 大約六十日，最近為咗應付張大訂單，提前入定貨。
sentences.en: About sixty days — we stocked up early recently for a big order.

sentences.formal: 下午可以安排我們和財務總監開會嗎？想核對一下應收帳款。
sentences.colloquial: 下晝可唔可以安排我哋同財務總監開會呀？想核對吓應收帳款。
sentences.en: Could you arrange a meeting with the CFO this afternoon? We'd like to verify the receivables.

sentences.formal: 可以，他兩點有空。中午先請你們吃一頓便飯。
sentences.colloquial: 得，佢兩點得閒。晏晝先請你哋食餐便飯。
sentences.en: Sure, he's free at two. Let us treat you to a simple lunch first.

sentences.formal: 剛才那個業績電話會議你怎麼看？管理層的語氣好像轉趨保守。
sentences.colloquial: 頭先個業績con call你點睇呀？管理層口風好似保守咗。
sentences.en: What did you make of that earnings call? Management's tone seemed to turn more cautious.

sentences.formal: 是，毛利率指引下調了兩個百分點，主要是原材料成本上升。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，毛利率指引下調咗兩個百分點，主要係原材料成本升咗。
sentences.en: Yes — gross margin guidance was cut by two percentage points, mainly on rising raw material costs.

sentences.formal: 收入那邊呢？第三季的增長還算穩健吧？
sentences.colloquial: 收入嗰邊呢？第三季嘅增長都算穩健吖嘛？
sentences.en: What about revenue? Third-quarter growth was still solid, right?

sentences.formal: 按年增長百分之十二，超過市場預期，不過新訂單放緩了。
sentences.colloquial: 按年增長百分之十二，好過市場預期，不過新訂單慢咗。
sentences.en: Up twelve percent year on year, beating market expectations, but new orders slowed.

sentences.formal: 問答環節有人問到那筆收購，管理層的回答有點迴避。
sentences.colloquial: Q&A嗰時有人問到嗰單收購，管理層答得有啲閃縮。
sentences.en: In the Q&A someone asked about that acquisition — management was a bit evasive.

sentences.formal: 我也留意到，估計監管審批還沒有落實。
sentences.colloquial: 我都留意到，估計監管審批仲未落實。
sentences.en: I noticed that too — the regulatory approval probably isn't secured yet.

sentences.formal: 那我們的持倉怎麼辦？你建議加倉還是減持？
sentences.colloquial: 咁我哋嘅持倉點算？你建議加倉定減持呀？
sentences.en: So what do we do with our position — do you recommend adding or trimming?

sentences.formal: 短線先減三分之一，等下個月的銷售數據出來再決定。
sentences.colloquial: 短線減住三分之一先，等下個月啲銷售數據出咗再決定。
sentences.en: Trim a third for now, then decide after next month's sales data comes out.

sentences.formal: 合理。你今晚把摘要寫好，明早投資委員會要用。
sentences.colloquial: 合理。你今晚寫好個summary，聽朝投資委員會要用。
sentences.en: Reasonable. Write up the summary tonight — the investment committee needs it tomorrow morning.

sentences.formal: 好，我順便更新一下估值模型的假設。
sentences.colloquial: 好，我順便update埋個估值model嘅假設。
sentences.en: Sure, and I'll update the valuation model assumptions while I'm at it.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想查詢按揭，打算買一個六百萬左右的單位。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想問吓按揭，打算買個六百萬左右嘅單位。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to ask about a mortgage — I'm planning to buy a flat around six million.

sentences.formal: 好的，請問是自住還是投資？首期預算多少？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，請問係自住定投資？首期預算幾多呀？
sentences.en: Sure — is it for living in or investment? What's your down-payment budget?

sentences.formal: 自住，首期大約一百五十萬。
sentences.colloquial: 自住，首期大約一百五十萬。
sentences.en: For living in — the down payment is about one and a half million.

sentences.formal: 那可以借七成半左右，年期最長三十年。
sentences.colloquial: 咁可以借七成半左右，年期最長三十年。
sentences.en: Then you can borrow about seventy-five percent, over a term of up to thirty years.

sentences.formal: 現在利率是多少？聽說最近減了息。
sentences.colloquial: 而家利率係幾多呀？聽講最近減咗息喎。
sentences.en: What's the interest rate now? I heard rates were cut recently.

sentences.formal: 現在實際利率大約百分之三點五，另外有百分之一的現金回贈。
sentences.colloquial: 而家實際利率大約百分之三點五，另外仲有百分之一現金回贈添。
sentences.en: The effective rate is about three point five percent, plus a one percent cash rebate.

sentences.formal: 每月供款大約多少？
sentences.colloquial: 咁每個月供大約幾多呀？
sentences.en: Roughly how much would the monthly payment be?

sentences.formal: 借四百五十萬、供三十年的話，每月大約兩萬二左右。
sentences.colloquial: 借四百五十萬、供三十年嘅話，每個月大約兩萬二左右。
sentences.en: Borrowing four and a half million over thirty years, roughly twenty-two thousand a month.

sentences.formal: 壓力測試需要什麼文件？
sentences.colloquial: 壓力測試要咩文件㗎？
sentences.en: What documents are needed for the stress test?

sentences.formal: 最近三個月的糧單、稅單和銀行月結單。你可以先做免費的預先批核。
sentences.colloquial: 最近三個月嘅糧單、稅單同埋月結單。你可以先做個免費嘅預先批核。
sentences.en: Your last three months' payslips, tax return, and bank statements. You can start with a free pre-approval.

sentences.formal: 好，那麻煩你幫我申請預先批核。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，咁唔該你幫我申請預先批核啦。
sentences.en: Great — then please help me apply for the pre-approval.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想申請報銷上星期出差的費用，程序是怎樣的？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我上個禮拜出trip嗰啲使費想claim返，程序係點㗎？
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to claim my business-trip expenses from last week — what's the process?

sentences.formal: 在系統填報銷表，附上收據，然後等部門主管批核。
sentences.colloquial: 喺system度填張claim form，attach埋啲單，然後等部門主管批。
sentences.en: Fill in the claim form in the system, attach the receipts, then wait for your department head's approval.

sentences.formal: 的士的收據我丟失了一張，怎麼辦？
sentences.colloquial: 的士飛我唔見咗一張，點算呀？
sentences.en: I lost one of the taxi receipts — what should I do?

sentences.formal: 二百元以下可以填一份無收據聲明，超過就要主管特別批准。
sentences.colloquial: 二百蚊以下可以填份冇單聲明，超過就要主管特別批准。
sentences.en: Under two hundred dollars you can file a no-receipt declaration; above that needs special approval from your manager.

sentences.formal: 明白。招待客戶的晚餐有上限嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。請客戶食晚飯有冇上限㗎？
sentences.en: Got it. Is there a cap on client dinners?

sentences.formal: 每人五百元，而且要寫清楚客戶公司和出席人數。
sentences.colloquial: 每人五百蚊，仲要寫清楚客戶間公司同埋幾多人出席。
sentences.en: Five hundred per head, and you must state the client's company and the number of attendees.

sentences.formal: 好的。報銷一般什麼時候到帳？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀。啲錢一般幾時到帳㗎？
sentences.en: Okay. When does the reimbursement usually arrive?

sentences.formal: 批核後隨下一個發薪日一起過帳。月底前交就趕得及這個月。
sentences.colloquial: 批咗之後下一個出糧日一齊過數。月尾前交就趕得切今個月。
sentences.en: It's paid with the next payroll after approval. Submit before month-end to make this month's run.

sentences.formal: 那我今天下午就交。順便問一下，明年的差旅預算會削減嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 咁我今日下晝就交。順便問埋，出年嘅差旅budget會唔會cut呀？
sentences.en: I'll submit it this afternoon then. By the way, will next year's travel budget be cut?

sentences.formal: 聽說會收緊一成，所以出差前記得先申請批准。
sentences.colloquial: 聽講會收緊一成，所以出trip之前記得申請批准先。
sentences.en: I heard it'll tighten by ten percent, so remember to get approval before you travel.

sentences.formal: 你有留意下星期那隻新股嗎？聽說超額認購幾十倍。
sentences.colloquial: 你有冇留意下個禮拜嗰隻新股呀？聽講超購幾十倍喎。
sentences.en: Have you seen next week's IPO? I heard it's oversubscribed dozens of times.

sentences.formal: 那間科技公司？我看過招股書，估值不便宜。
sentences.colloquial: 嗰間科技公司？我睇過份招股書，個估值唔平㗎。
sentences.en: That tech company? I read the prospectus — the valuation isn't cheap.

sentences.formal: 但是基石投資者陣容很強，幾家大基金都認購了。
sentences.colloquial: 但係啲基石投資者陣容好勁喎，幾間大基金都入咗飛。
sentences.en: But the cornerstone investors are strong — several big funds have subscribed.

sentences.formal: 你打算抽多少？一手入場費大約一萬元。
sentences.colloquial: 咁你打算抽幾多呀？一手入場費大約一萬蚊。
sentences.en: How much will you apply for? One lot costs about ten thousand to get in.

sentences.formal: 我抽五手，用孖展的話中籤機會大一點。
sentences.colloquial: 我抽五手，用孖展嘅話中籤機會大啲。
sentences.en: I'll go for five lots — using margin gives a better chance of allocation.

sentences.formal: 小心啊，孖展要付利息，如果首日跌穿招股價就雙重損失。
sentences.colloquial: 小心呀，孖展要畀利息㗎，如果第一日跌穿招股價就蝕上加蝕。
sentences.en: Careful — margin costs interest, and if it breaks the offer price on day one you lose twice over.

sentences.formal: 我打算上市當天就賣出，賺一點就走。
sentences.colloquial: 我打算上市嗰日就沽咗佢，賺少少就走。
sentences.en: I plan to sell on listing day — take a small profit and get out.

sentences.formal: 上一隻新股首日升了三成，不過再上一隻跌了一成半。
sentences.colloquial: 上一隻新股第一日升咗三成，不過再上一隻跌咗一成半喎。
sentences.en: The last IPO jumped thirty percent on day one, but the one before fell fifteen percent.

sentences.formal: 投資總有風險，反正我金額不大，當是買一個希望。
sentences.colloquial: 投資梗係有風險啦，反正我銀碼唔大，當買個希望囉。
sentences.en: There's always risk in investing — my stake is small anyway, call it buying a hope.

sentences.formal: 好吧，祝你中籤！中了記得請吃飯。
sentences.colloquial: 好啦，祝你抽中啦！中咗記得請食飯呀。
sentences.en: Fine — good luck with the allocation! Treat us to dinner if you win.

sentences.formal: 早上好，今天想跟進年度審計的幾個未解決事項。
sentences.colloquial: 早晨，今日想跟進年度audit幾個未搞掂嘅事項。
sentences.en: Morning — today I'd like to follow up on a few outstanding items from the annual audit.

sentences.formal: 好的，請說，我已經準備好相關文件。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，你講啦，我預備好晒啲相關文件。
sentences.en: Sure, go ahead — I have the relevant documents ready.

sentences.formal: 首先是應收帳款，有三筆超過九十天還沒有收回。
sentences.colloquial: 首先係應收帳款，有三筆過咗九十日仲未收返。
sentences.en: First, receivables — three items are more than ninety days overdue.

sentences.formal: 其中兩筆上星期已經收到，餘下一筆客戶承諾月底前支付。
sentences.colloquial: 其中兩筆上個禮拜已經收咗，淨返嗰筆客戶應承月尾前找數。
sentences.en: Two were received last week; the remaining customer has promised to pay by month-end.

sentences.formal: 請提供銀行入帳紀錄。第二是存貨撥備，你們的比率比同業低。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該提供銀行入帳紀錄。第二係存貨撥備，你哋個比率低過同業喎。
sentences.en: Please provide the bank records. Second, the inventory provision — your ratio is below industry peers.

sentences.formal: 因為我們的產品周轉快，滯銷貨很少，我可以給你明細帳齡表。
sentences.colloquial: 因為我哋啲產品周轉快，滯銷貨好少，我可以畀個明細帳齡表你。
sentences.en: Our products turn over quickly and there's little slow stock — I can give you the detailed ageing schedule.

sentences.formal: 好。另外管理層那筆關聯交易，需要獨立董事的批准文件。
sentences.colloquial: 好。另外管理層嗰筆關聯交易，要獨立董事嘅批准文件。
sentences.en: Fine. Also, that related-party transaction with management needs the independent directors' approval papers.

sentences.formal: 董事會紀錄在這裏，條款和市場價一致。
sentences.colloquial: 董事會紀錄喺呢度，啲條款同市價一致㗎。
sentences.en: The board minutes are right here — the terms are consistent with market rates.

sentences.formal: 明白。最後，我們計劃下星期三做存貨盤點，可以配合嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。最後，我哋計劃下個禮拜三做存貨盤點，你哋配唔配合到呀？
sentences.en: Understood. Lastly, we plan to do the stock count next Wednesday — can you accommodate that?

sentences.formal: 可以，我會通知倉庫主管提前準備。
sentences.colloquial: 得，我會通知倉庫主管提前準備。
sentences.en: Yes, I'll tell the warehouse supervisor to prepare in advance.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想把港幣兌換成英鎊，然後匯給在倫敦讀書的女兒。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想將啲港紙唱做英鎊，然後匯畀我個喺倫敦讀書嘅女。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to change Hong Kong dollars into pounds and remit them to my daughter studying in London.

sentences.formal: 好的，請問要兌換多少？現在的匯率是九點八左右。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，請問要唱幾多呀？而家匯率係九點八左右。
sentences.en: Sure — how much would you like to change? The rate is around nine point eight right now.

sentences.formal: 兌五千英鎊。可以用匯率好一點的網上價嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 唱五千鎊。用匯率好啲嘅網上價得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Five thousand pounds. Can I get the better online rate?

sentences.formal: 可以，你在手機應用程式辦理，匯率會好半個百分點。
sentences.colloquial: 得，你喺手機app度做，匯率會好半個百分點。
sentences.en: Yes — do it in the mobile app and the rate is half a percent better.

sentences.formal: 那匯款手續費呢？大約幾天到帳？
sentences.colloquial: 咁匯款手續費呢？大約幾日到帳㗎？
sentences.en: What about the remittance fee, and how many days does it take to arrive?

sentences.formal: 網上匯款手續費五十元，一般兩個工作天到帳。
sentences.colloquial: 網上匯款手續費五十蚊，一般兩個工作天到。
sentences.en: The online fee is fifty dollars, and it usually arrives within two working days.

sentences.formal: 需要什麼資料？
sentences.colloquial: 要啲咩資料㗎？
sentences.en: What details are needed?

sentences.formal: 收款人姓名、銀行名稱、帳號和SWIFT編號，另外要申報匯款用途。
sentences.colloquial: 收款人姓名、銀行名、帳號同SWIFT number，另外要申報匯款用途。
sentences.en: The payee's name, bank name, account number and SWIFT code, plus you must declare the purpose of the transfer.

sentences.formal: 用途是學費和生活費。有金額上限嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 用途係學費同生活費。有冇金額上限㗎？
sentences.en: It's for tuition and living costs. Is there a limit on the amount?

sentences.formal: 網上每天上限四十萬港元，超過就要來分行辦理。
sentences.colloquial: 網上每日上限四十萬港紙，超過就要嚟分行做。
sentences.en: The daily online limit is four hundred thousand Hong Kong dollars — above that, you'll need to come to the branch.

sentences.formal: 明白了，我現在就在應用程式試試，謝謝你。
sentences.colloquial: 明白喇，我而家喺個app度試吓先，唔該晒。
sentences.en: Got it — I'll try it in the app right now. Thank you.

sentences.formal: 這個單位五百平方呎，兩房一廳，開放式廚房，還有海景。
sentences.colloquial: 呢個單位五百呎，兩房一廳，開放式廚房，仲有海景㗎。
sentences.en: This flat is five hundred square feet — two bedrooms, a living room, an open kitchen, and a sea view.

sentences.formal: 挺不錯。租金一個月多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 幾好喎。租金幾多錢一個月呀？
sentences.en: Not bad. How much is the rent per month?

sentences.formal: 業主開價兩萬二千元，包括管理費和差餉。
sentences.colloquial: 業主開價兩萬二，包管理費同差餉。
sentences.en: The landlord is asking twenty-two thousand, inclusive of management fee and rates.

sentences.formal: 兩萬二千元有點貴，兩萬一千元可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 兩萬二有啲貴喎，兩萬一得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Twenty-two thousand is a bit steep — would twenty-one thousand work?

sentences.formal: 我可以幫你跟業主談談。租約通常是一年死約一年生約。
sentences.colloquial: 我可以幫你同業主傾吓。租約通常一年死約一年生約。
sentences.en: I can negotiate with the landlord for you. The lease is usually a one-year fixed term plus a one-year break-clause period.

sentences.formal: 按金怎麼計算？
sentences.colloquial: 按金點計呀？
sentences.en: How does the deposit work?

sentences.formal: 兩按一上，就是兩個月按金加一個月預付租金。
sentences.colloquial: 兩按一上，即係兩個月按金加一個月上期。
sentences.en: Two deposits and one advance — that's two months' deposit plus one month's rent up front.

sentences.formal: 冷氣和電器有沒有問題？很舊嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 冷氣同電器有冇問題㗎？舊唔舊呀？
sentences.en: Is there anything wrong with the air-conditioning and appliances? Are they old?

sentences.formal: 全部剛剛換過，還有一年保養。你喜歡的話，最快下個月一號可以入住。
sentences.colloquial: 全部啱啱換咗，仲有一年保養。你鍾意嘅話，最快下個月一號可以入伙。
sentences.en: All just replaced, still under a one-year warranty. If you like it, you could move in as early as the first of next month.

sentences.formal: 好，如果業主願意減到兩萬一千元，我就簽約。
sentences.colloquial: 好，如果業主肯減到兩萬一，我就簽。
sentences.en: Okay — if the landlord will come down to twenty-one thousand, I'll sign.

sentences.formal: 你好，我是十五樓B室的住客。明天有朋友來探訪，需要登記嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我係十五樓B室嘅住客。聽日有朋友嚟探我，使唔使登記呀？
sentences.en: Hi, I live in Flat B on the fifteenth floor. A friend is visiting tomorrow — do they need to register?

sentences.formal: 需要，訪客要在大堂登記，留下姓名和電話就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 要呀，訪客要喺大堂登記，留低個名同電話就得㗎喇。
sentences.en: Yes — visitors register at the lobby; just a name and phone number will do.

sentences.formal: 明白。還有，我星期六有一張梳化送到，想預約貨用升降機。
sentences.colloquial: 明白。仲有，我禮拜六有張梳化送嚟，想book埋貨lift。
sentences.en: Got it. Also, I have a sofa arriving on Saturday and I'd like to book the freight lift.

sentences.formal: 沒問題，貨用升降機要提前一天預約。你想約什麼時間？
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，貨lift要早一日book。你想約幾點呀？
sentences.en: No problem — the freight lift has to be booked a day in advance. What time would you like?

sentences.formal: 下午兩點到四點可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 下晝兩點到四點得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Would two to four in the afternoon work?

sentences.formal: 可以，我幫你記下了。記住搬運工人要使用後門出入。
sentences.colloquial: 得，我幫你寫低咗。記住班搬運工人要行後門出入呀。
sentences.en: Fine, I've noted it down. Remember the movers have to use the rear entrance.

sentences.formal: 好的。另外我想投訴，樓上經常晚上十二點多還在鑽牆，吵得我睡不着。
sentences.colloquial: 好。另外我想投訴，樓上成日夜晚十二點幾仲喺度鑽牆，嘈到我瞓唔到。
sentences.en: Okay. One more thing — I'd like to complain: the flat upstairs is often still drilling past midnight, so noisy I can't sleep.

sentences.formal: 不好意思，裝修時間是早上九點到下午六點。我們會警告那個單位。
sentences.colloquial: 唔好意思，裝修時間係朝早九點到下晝六點。我哋會警告嗰個單位。
sentences.en: Sorry about that — renovation hours are nine in the morning to six in the evening. We'll warn that unit.

sentences.formal: 謝謝。如果再這樣，我可以怎麼辦？
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒。如果再係咁，我可以點做呀？
sentences.en: Thanks. If it happens again, what can I do?

sentences.formal: 你可以隨時致電管理處，晚上也有人當值。
sentences.colloquial: 你可以隨時打嚟管理處，夜晚都有人當值㗎。
sentences.en: You can call the management office any time — someone is on duty even at night.

sentences.formal: 喂，師傅你好，我家的冷氣機滴水，還滴到樓下的簷篷，想請你來修理。
sentences.colloquial: 喂，師傅你好，我屋企部冷氣滴水，仲滴到落樓下個簷篷度，想搵你嚟整。
sentences.en: Hello, is that the repairman? My air-conditioner is dripping water — even onto the canopy downstairs — and I'd like you to come fix it.

sentences.formal: 那部機是什麼牌子？用了多久？
sentences.colloquial: 部機咩牌子㗎？用咗幾耐呀？
sentences.en: What brand is the unit? How long have you had it?

sentences.formal: 大金，用了五六年。還有廚房的鋅盤堵塞了，排水很慢。
sentences.colloquial: 大金，用咗五六年。仲有廚房個鋅盤塞咗，去水好慢。
sentences.en: A Daikin, five or six years old. The kitchen sink is blocked too — it drains really slowly.

sentences.formal: 冷氣滴水多數是排水管堵塞，或者隔塵網太髒，要清洗一下。兩樣一起處理吧。
sentences.colloquial: 冷氣滴水多數係條去水喉塞咗，或者個隔塵網太污糟，要洗吓。兩樣一齊搞啦。
sentences.en: A dripping AC is usually a blocked drain pipe or a filthy dust filter that needs cleaning. Let's deal with both in one go.

sentences.formal: 好的。要多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀。要幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: Sure. How much will it cost?

sentences.formal: 清洗冷氣六百元，疏通渠道四百五十元，一起做算你一千元吧。
sentences.colloquial: 洗冷氣六百，通渠四百五，一齊做算你一千蚊啦。
sentences.en: Six hundred for the AC cleaning, four hundred fifty for unblocking the drain — I'll do both for a thousand.

sentences.formal: 好，那你什麼時候有空過來？
sentences.colloquial: 好，咁你幾時得閒嚟呀？
sentences.en: Okay — when are you free to come?

sentences.formal: 明天下午三點到五點可以嗎？我到了會打電話給你。
sentences.colloquial: 聽日下晝三點到五點得唔得？我到咗會打畀你。
sentences.en: Tomorrow between three and five in the afternoon? I'll call you when I arrive.

sentences.formal: 可以。師傅，你收現金嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 得。師傅，你收唔收現金㗎？
sentences.en: That works. Do you take cash?

sentences.formal: 現金或者轉數快都可以。明天見。
sentences.colloquial: 現金定轉數快都得。聽日見。
sentences.en: Cash or FPS, either is fine. See you tomorrow.

sentences.formal: 你好，今天想怎麼剪？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，今日想點剪呀？
sentences.en: Hi, how would you like it cut today?

sentences.formal: 麻煩幫我剪短一點，兩邊剃短，上面留長一些。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該幫我cut短啲，兩邊鏟青，上面留返長少少。
sentences.en: Shorter, please — fade the sides and leave a bit of length on top.

sentences.formal: 兩邊用幾號電剪？三號夠不夠短？
sentences.colloquial: 兩邊用幾號呀？三號夠唔夠短？
sentences.en: What clipper number for the sides? Is a three short enough?

sentences.formal: 三號吧。前面不要剪得太短，我上班要見客戶。
sentences.colloquial: 三號啦。前面唔好剪咁短，我返工要見客㗎。
sentences.en: A three. Don't take the front too short — I have to see clients at work.

sentences.formal: 沒問題。要不要洗頭？洗剪吹一起才一百八十元。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題。使唔使洗埋個頭呀？洗剪吹一齊先一百八十蚊咋。
sentences.en: No problem. Would you like a wash too? Wash, cut and blow-dry together is only a hundred and eighty dollars.

sentences.formal: 好的，那一起洗吧。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，洗埋啦。
sentences.en: Sure, include the wash then.

sentences.formal: 剪好了，你看看後面可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 剪好喇，你睇吓後面得唔得？
sentences.en: All done — have a look at the back. Is it okay?

sentences.formal: 挺好的，謝謝。一共多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 幾好呀，唔該晒。埋單幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: Looks great, thanks. How much do I owe?

sentences.formal: 一百八十元。這裡不用給小費，下次再光顧就可以了。
sentences.colloquial: 一百八。呢度唔使畀貼士㗎，下次再嚟幫襯就得喇。
sentences.en: A hundred and eighty. No need to tip here — just come back next time.

sentences.formal: 好的，謝謝，下個月再來。
sentences.colloquial: 好，唔該晒，下個月再嚟。
sentences.en: Great, thank you — see you next month.

sentences.formal: 早上好！我們是搬運公司的，總共有多少箱東西？
sentences.colloquial: 早晨！我哋係搬屋公司嘅，總共有幾多箱嘢呀？
sentences.en: Good morning! We're from the moving company. How many boxes are there in total?

sentences.formal: 大約三十箱，還有一張床和一個衣櫃。
sentences.colloquial: 大約三十箱，仲有一張床同一個衣櫃。
sentences.en: About thirty boxes, plus a bed and a wardrobe.

sentences.formal: 衣櫃需要拆開才能搬出去。
sentences.colloquial: 個衣櫃要拆開先搬得出去㗎。
sentences.en: The wardrobe has to be taken apart before we can move it out.

sentences.formal: 沒問題。這幾箱裝的是碗碟，請小心一點。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題。呢幾箱裝住碗碟，麻煩小心啲呀。
sentences.en: No problem. These boxes have dishes inside, please be careful with them.

sentences.formal: 放心，易碎物品我們會用毛毯包好。
sentences.colloquial: 放心啦，易碎嘢我哋會用毛毯包好。
sentences.en: Don't worry, we wrap fragile items in blankets.

sentences.formal: 新居在九龍灣，沒有升降機，要走三層樓梯。
sentences.colloquial: 新屋喺九龍灣，冇𨋢，要行三層樓梯。
sentences.en: The new place is in Kowloon Bay. There's no lift, so it's three flights of stairs.

sentences.formal: 走樓梯要加收二百元，可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 行樓梯要加二百蚊，得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Stairs cost two hundred dollars extra. Is that okay?

sentences.formal: 可以，那就麻煩你們了。
sentences.colloquial: 得，咁就麻煩你哋喇。
sentences.en: That's fine. Thanks for your trouble.

sentences.formal: 好，我們大約中午十二點可以搬完。
sentences.colloquial: 好，我哋大約晏晝十二點搬得晒。
sentences.en: Great, we should be done by around noon.

sentences.formal: 太好了，辛苦你們，我買了汽水給大家。
sentences.colloquial: 好嘢，辛苦晒，我買咗汽水畀大家飲。
sentences.en: Wonderful. Thanks for the hard work — I bought soft drinks for everyone.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想買一張沙發，客廳不太大。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想買張梳化，個廳唔係好大。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a sofa. My living room isn't very big.

sentences.formal: 這款兩座位沙發很受歡迎，布套可以拆下來洗。
sentences.colloquial: 呢款兩座位梳化好受歡迎，布套拆得落嚟洗㗎。
sentences.en: This two-seater is very popular, and the fabric cover comes off for washing.

sentences.formal: 坐上去試一試可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 坐上去試吓得唔得呀？
sentences.en: May I sit down and try it?

sentences.formal: 當然可以，隨便試。
sentences.colloquial: 梗係得啦，隨便試。
sentences.en: Of course, go ahead.

sentences.formal: 很舒服，多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 幾舒服喎，幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: Very comfy. How much is it?

sentences.formal: 原價五千八百元，現在特價四千五百元。
sentences.colloquial: 原價五千八，而家特價四千五百蚊。
sentences.en: The original price is five thousand eight hundred, but it's on special now for four thousand five hundred.

sentences.formal: 有沒有其他顏色？
sentences.colloquial: 有冇第二隻色呀？
sentences.en: Does it come in other colours?

sentences.formal: 有灰色和深藍色，大約兩星期到貨。
sentences.colloquial: 有灰色同深藍色，大約兩個禮拜到貨。
sentences.en: There's grey and navy blue. Delivery takes about two weeks.

sentences.formal: 好，我要灰色的，可以送貨上門嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 好，我要灰色嗰張，可唔可以送貨上門呀？
sentences.en: Okay, I'll take the grey one. Do you deliver?

sentences.formal: 可以，購物滿四千元免費送貨。
sentences.colloquial: 得，買滿四千蚊免費送貨㗎。
sentences.en: Yes — delivery is free when you spend over four thousand dollars.

sentences.formal: 你好，我是網絡公司的，來安裝寬頻。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我係網絡公司嘅，嚟裝寬頻。
sentences.en: Hello, I'm from the internet company, here to install your broadband.

sentences.formal: 請進。路由器放在客廳可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 入嚟啦。個路由器擺喺廳得唔得？
sentences.en: Come in. Can the router go in the living room?

sentences.formal: 可以，不過插座離接線口有點遠。
sentences.colloquial: 得，不過個插蘇離接線口有啲遠。
sentences.en: It can, but the power socket is a bit far from the connection point.

sentences.formal: 那放在書房呢？那裡有插座。
sentences.colloquial: 咁擺喺書房呢？嗰度有插蘇。
sentences.en: What about the study, then? There's a socket there.

sentences.formal: 好，我先拉線，大約需要四十五分鐘。
sentences.colloquial: 好，我拉線先，大約要四十五分鐘。
sentences.en: Sure. I'll run the cable first — it'll take about forty-five minutes.

sentences.formal: 這個計劃的網速是一千兆嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 呢個計劃嘅網速係咪一千M呀？
sentences.en: Is this plan the one-thousand-megabit speed?

sentences.formal: 是的，等一下我幫你測試一下速度。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，陣間我幫你測吓速度。
sentences.en: That's right. I'll run a speed test for you in a moment.

sentences.formal: 如果睡房收不到訊號怎麼辦？
sentences.colloquial: 如果睡房收唔到訊號點算呀？
sentences.en: What if the bedroom doesn't get a signal?

sentences.formal: 可以加一個訊號擴展器，每月多收三十元。
sentences.colloquial: 可以加個訊號擴展器，每個月多收三十蚊。
sentences.en: You can add a signal extender for thirty dollars extra a month.

sentences.formal: 暫時不用了，謝謝你。
sentences.colloquial: 暫時唔使住，唔該晒。
sentences.en: Not for now, thanks.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想洗這幾件衣服。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想洗呢幾件衫。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to get these clothes washed.

sentences.formal: 好的，一共五件。普通清洗還是乾洗？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，一共五件。磅洗定乾洗呀？
sentences.en: Sure, five pieces in total. Regular wash or dry cleaning?

sentences.formal: 這件西裝外套要乾洗，其他普通清洗就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 呢件西裝褸要乾洗，其他磅洗就得喇。
sentences.en: This suit jacket needs dry cleaning; regular wash is fine for the rest.

sentences.formal: 西裝乾洗六十元，其餘按重量計算。
sentences.colloquial: 西裝乾洗六十蚊，其他按磅計。
sentences.en: Dry cleaning the suit is sixty dollars; the rest is charged by weight.

sentences.formal: 這件白襯衫的領口有咖啡漬，可以處理嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 呢件白恤衫個領有咖啡漬，搞唔搞得掂呀？
sentences.en: This white shirt has a coffee stain on the collar. Can you deal with it?

sentences.formal: 我們會盡量處理，但不能保證完全去除。
sentences.colloquial: 我哋會盡量搞，但係唔保證去得晒。
sentences.en: We'll do our best, but we can't guarantee it comes out completely.

sentences.formal: 明白。什麼時候可以取？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。幾時可以攞呀？
sentences.en: Understood. When can I pick them up?

sentences.formal: 後天下午五點以後，這是收據。
sentences.colloquial: 後日下晝五點之後，呢張係收條。
sentences.en: The day after tomorrow, after five in the afternoon. Here's your receipt.

sentences.formal: 好的，謝謝。
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，唔該晒。
sentences.en: Great, thank you.

title.en: A word with the noisy neighbour

sentences.formal: 你好，不好意思打擾你，我住在樓下十二樓。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，唔好意思打攪你，我住喺樓下十二樓。
sentences.en: Hi, sorry to bother you — I live downstairs on the twelfth floor.

sentences.formal: 你好，有什麼事嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，咩事呀？
sentences.en: Hello — is something the matter?

sentences.formal: 最近晚上常常聽到拖椅子和小孩跑步的聲音，比較影響休息。
sentences.colloquial: 最近晚黑成日聽到拖櫈同小朋友跑嚟跑去嘅聲，幾影響瞓覺。
sentences.en: Lately at night I keep hearing chairs dragging and kids running around — it's affecting my sleep a bit.

sentences.formal: 真不好意思！小孩子精力太旺盛，我們會多加注意。
sentences.colloquial: 真係唔好意思！啲細路太好動，我哋會注意啲。
sentences.en: I'm so sorry! The kids have too much energy — we'll be more careful.

sentences.formal: 我明白，小孩子難免活潑，只是晚上十點以後可以安靜一點嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 我明白嘅，細路仔梗係好動啲，不過夜晚十點之後可唔可以靜啲呀？
sentences.en: I understand — kids will be kids. Could things just be a bit quieter after ten at night?

sentences.formal: 當然可以，我們會鋪一張地墊，減少聲音。
sentences.colloquial: 梗係得，我哋會鋪張地墊，冇咁嘈。
sentences.en: Of course. We'll put down a floor mat to cut the noise.

sentences.formal: 那就太好了。其實你們平日很客氣，我也不想小題大做。
sentences.colloquial: 咁就最好喇。其實你哋平時好客氣，我都唔想小題大做。
sentences.en: That would be great. You've always been very courteous — I don't want to make a big deal of it.

sentences.formal: 應該的，遠親不如近鄰，有問題隨時告訴我們。
sentences.colloquial: 應該嘅，遠親不如近鄰，有咩問題隨時話我哋知。
sentences.en: It's the right thing to do — good neighbours beat distant relatives. Let us know any time there's a problem.

sentences.formal: 謝謝你的體諒，改天請你們喝茶。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒你咁體諒，第日請你哋飲茶。
sentences.en: Thanks for being so understanding. Let me treat you to dim sum some day.

sentences.formal: 好啊，一言為定！
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，一言為定！
sentences.en: Sounds good — it's a deal!

sentences.formal: 你好，是陳姐嗎？我在網上看到你的資料。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，係咪陳姐呀？我喺網上面見到你嘅資料。
sentences.en: Hello, is this Chan Jeh? I saw your listing online.

sentences.formal: 是的，你想請鐘點工人嗎？家裡有多大？
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，你想請鐘點呀？屋企有幾大呀？
sentences.en: Yes. You're looking for a part-time cleaner? How big is your place?

sentences.formal: 大約五百呎，兩房一廳，想每星期打掃兩次。
sentences.colloquial: 大約五百呎，兩房一廳，想一個禮拜打掃兩次。
sentences.en: About five hundred square feet, two bedrooms and a living room. I'd like cleaning twice a week.

sentences.formal: 每次三小時，每小時九十元，可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 每次三個鐘，一個鐘九十蚊，得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Three hours per visit, ninety dollars an hour. Does that work?

sentences.formal: 可以。主要是吸塵、拖地和清潔洗手間。
sentences.colloquial: 得。主要係吸塵、拖地同埋洗廁所。
sentences.en: That works. It's mainly vacuuming, mopping and cleaning the bathroom.

sentences.formal: 需要煮飯或者熨衣服嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 使唔使煮飯或者熨衫呀？
sentences.en: Do you need cooking or ironing?

sentences.formal: 不用，不過偶爾想請你幫忙抹窗。
sentences.colloquial: 唔使，不過間中想你幫手抹窗。
sentences.en: No, but occasionally I'd like help wiping the windows.

sentences.formal: 抹窗每次加五十元。高層外面那一面我不抹，太危險。
sentences.colloquial: 抹窗每次加五十蚊。高層出面嗰便我唔抹㗎，太危險。
sentences.en: Windows are fifty dollars extra each time. I won't do the outside on high floors — too dangerous.

sentences.formal: 應該的，安全第一。星期二和星期五上午方便嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 應該嘅，安全第一。禮拜二同禮拜五朝早得唔得？
sentences.en: Absolutely, safety first. Are Tuesday and Friday mornings convenient?

sentences.formal: 方便，那就下星期二早上九點開始。
sentences.colloquial: 得呀，咁下個禮拜二朝早九點開始啦。
sentences.en: That's fine. Let's start next Tuesday at nine in the morning.

sentences.formal: 喂，你好，我把自己鎖在門外了，可以來開鎖嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 喂，你好呀，我鎖咗自己喺門外面，可唔可以嚟開鎖呀？
sentences.en: Hello? I've locked myself out — can you come open the door?

sentences.formal: 可以。你在哪一區？是什麼類型的鎖？
sentences.colloquial: 得。你喺邊區呀？係咩款鎖嚟㗎？
sentences.en: Sure. Which district are you in, and what kind of lock is it?

sentences.formal: 太古，是普通的珠鎖，鑰匙留在屋內。
sentences.colloquial: 太古，普通珠鎖，條鎖匙留咗喺屋企。
sentences.en: Tai Koo. It's an ordinary pin lock, and the key is inside the flat.

sentences.formal: 明白。開鎖四百元，如果要換鎖芯另外計算。
sentences.colloquial: 明白。開鎖四百蚊，如果要換鎖膽另計。
sentences.en: Got it. Opening the lock is four hundred dollars; replacing the cylinder is extra.

sentences.formal: 好，大概多久可以到？
sentences.colloquial: 好，大概幾耐到呀？
sentences.en: Okay. Roughly how long until you get here?

sentences.formal: 我在附近，二十分鐘左右。
sentences.colloquial: 我喺附近，二十分鐘度啦。
sentences.en: I'm nearby — about twenty minutes.

sentences.formal: 太好了，我在大堂等你。
sentences.colloquial: 好彩！我喺大堂等你。
sentences.en: Great, I'll wait for you in the lobby.

sentences.formal: 先生，麻煩出示身份證，證明你是住戶。
sentences.colloquial: 先生，唔該出示身份證，證明你係住戶。
sentences.en: Sir, please show me your ID card to prove you live here.

sentences.formal: 沒問題，這是我的身份證，地址在上面。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，呢張係我身份證，地址喺上面。
sentences.en: No problem — here's my ID card, the address is on it.

sentences.formal: 好，開好了。建議你多配一條後備鑰匙放在公司。
sentences.colloquial: 好，開好喇。建議你配多條後備鎖匙擺喺公司。
sentences.en: There, it's open. I'd suggest getting a spare key cut and keeping it at your office.

sentences.formal: 一定會，謝謝你救了我！
sentences.colloquial: 一定會，唔該晒你救咗我！
sentences.en: I definitely will. Thanks for rescuing me!

sentences.formal: 師傅，最近晚上在廚房見到蟑螂，麻煩你看一看。
sentences.colloquial: 師傅，最近夜晚喺廚房見到曱甴，麻煩你睇睇。
sentences.en: Sifu, I've been seeing cockroaches in the kitchen at night. Please take a look.

sentences.formal: 好，我先檢查一下洗滌盆底部和冰箱後面。
sentences.colloquial: 好，我檢查吓鋅盤底同雪櫃後面先。
sentences.en: Sure. Let me check under the sink and behind the fridge first.

sentences.formal: 情況嚴重嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 嚴唔嚴重呀？
sentences.en: Is it serious?

sentences.formal: 縫隙裡有幾隻，還好發現得早。
sentences.colloquial: 罅隙度有幾隻，好彩發現得早。
sentences.en: There are a few in the crevices. Luckily you caught it early.

sentences.formal: 需要噴藥嗎？家裡有小孩。
sentences.colloquial: 使唔使噴藥呀？屋企有細路。
sentences.en: Will you need to spray? We have a small child at home.

sentences.formal: 不用，我用藥餌，放在小孩接觸不到的地方，安全得多。
sentences.colloquial: 唔使，我用藥餌，擺喺細路掂唔到嘅位，安全好多。
sentences.en: No need. I'll use bait stations, placed where the child can't reach — much safer.

sentences.formal: 那平時要注意什麼？
sentences.colloquial: 咁平時要注意啲咩呀？
sentences.en: What should we watch out for day to day?

sentences.formal: 廚餘當晚就要丟掉，洗滌盆不要留水，門縫貼上膠條。
sentences.colloquial: 廚餘當晚就要掉，鋅盤唔好留低啲水，門罅貼膠條。
sentences.en: Throw out food waste the same night, don't leave water in the sink, and seal the door gaps with rubber strips.

sentences.formal: 明白了。一次可以除根嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 明白喇。一次搞唔搞得掂晒呀？
sentences.en: Got it. Will one visit wipe them out completely?

sentences.formal: 兩星期後我再來跟進一次，通常就沒有問題了。
sentences.colloquial: 兩個禮拜後我再嚟跟進一次，通常就冇問題㗎喇。
sentences.en: I'll come back for a follow-up in two weeks. After that it's usually fine.

sentences.formal: 好，謝謝師傅！
sentences.colloquial: 好，唔該晒師傅！
sentences.en: Great, thank you, sifu!

sentences.formal: 你好，今天哪裡不舒服？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，今日邊度唔舒服呀？
sentences.en: Hello — what's bothering you today?

sentences.formal: 我發燒，喉嚨也很痛。
sentences.colloquial: 我發燒，喉嚨又好痛。
sentences.en: I have a fever, and my throat really hurts too.

sentences.formal: 這樣多久了？
sentences.colloquial: 咁樣幾耐喇？
sentences.en: How long has it been like this?

sentences.formal: 大概兩天，昨晚燒到三十八度半。
sentences.colloquial: 大概兩日喇，尋晚燒到三十八度半。
sentences.en: About two days — last night my fever hit thirty-eight point five.

sentences.formal: 張開口讓我看看……喉嚨發炎，應該是上呼吸道感染。
sentences.colloquial: 擘大口等我睇吓……喉嚨發炎，應該係上呼吸道感染。
sentences.en: Open wide and let me have a look… your throat is inflamed — it looks like an upper respiratory infection.

sentences.formal: 嚴重嗎？需要吃抗生素嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 嚴唔嚴重㗎？使唔使食抗生素呀？
sentences.en: Is it serious? Do I need antibiotics?

sentences.formal: 不用，我開三天退燒藥和止痛藥給你，記得多喝水多休息。
sentences.colloquial: 唔使，我開三日退燒藥同止痛藥畀你，記住多飲水多休息。
sentences.en: No need — I'll prescribe three days of fever medicine and painkillers. Remember to drink plenty of water and rest.

sentences.formal: 可以幫我寫一張醫生證明嗎？我想請兩天病假。
sentences.colloquial: 可唔可以幫我寫張醫生紙呀？我想請兩日病假。
sentences.en: Could you write me a sick note? I'd like to take two days of sick leave.

sentences.formal: 可以。連藥物一共三百五十元，出去向護士付款就可以了。
sentences.colloquial: 得。連埋啲藥總共三百五十蚊，出去同姑娘畀錢就得喇。
sentences.en: Sure. It's three hundred and fifty dollars including the medicine — just pay the nurse outside.

sentences.formal: 好的，謝謝醫生。
sentences.colloquial: 好，唔該晒醫生。
sentences.en: Okay — thank you, doctor.

sentences.formal: 你好，我傷風，還有點頭痛，有什麼藥適合？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我傷風，仲有啲頭痛，有咩藥啱食呀？
sentences.en: Hi, I've got a cold and a bit of a headache — what medicine would suit?

sentences.formal: 這款傷風感冒藥挺好，退燒止痛都可以。
sentences.colloquial: 呢款傷風感冒藥幾好，退燒止痛都得。
sentences.en: This cold-and-flu medicine is quite good — it covers fever and pain relief too.

sentences.formal: 吃了會不會想睡覺？我下午還要上班。
sentences.colloquial: 食咗會唔會眼瞓㗎？我下晝仲要返工。
sentences.en: Will it make me drowsy? I still have to work this afternoon.

sentences.formal: 這款吃了會有睡意。如果要上班，建議拿這款沒有睡意的。
sentences.colloquial: 呢款食咗會眼瞓嘅。如果要返工，就攞呢款non-drowsy啦。
sentences.en: This one does cause drowsiness. If you're working, take this non-drowsy one instead.

sentences.formal: 好，要沒有睡意那款。應該怎樣吃？
sentences.colloquial: 好，要non-drowsy嗰款。點食㗎？
sentences.en: Okay, the non-drowsy one. How do I take it?

sentences.formal: 一次一粒，一天三次，飯後吃。
sentences.colloquial: 一次一粒，一日三次，食完飯食。
sentences.en: One tablet at a time, three times a day, after meals.

sentences.formal: 明白。多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: Got it. How much?

sentences.formal: 六十八元一盒。
sentences.colloquial: 六十八蚊一盒。
sentences.en: Sixty-eight dollars a box.

sentences.formal: 好，要一盒，謝謝。
sentences.colloquial: 好，要一盒，唔該。
sentences.en: Okay, one box please — thanks.

sentences.formal: 好的。如果三天後還不退燒，就要看醫生了。
sentences.colloquial: 好嘅。如果三日之後仲唔退燒，就要睇醫生喇。
sentences.en: Sure. If the fever hasn't gone after three days, you should see a doctor.

sentences.formal: 我覺得有點不舒服，頭很暈。
sentences.colloquial: 我覺得有啲唔舒服，個頭好暈。
sentences.en: I'm not feeling well — my head is really dizzy.

sentences.formal: 你的臉色很差，是不是發燒？
sentences.colloquial: 你面色好差喎，係唔係發燒呀？
sentences.en: You look terrible — do you have a fever?

sentences.formal: 好像有點熱，喉嚨也痛。
sentences.colloquial: 好似有啲熱，喉嚨又痛。
sentences.en: I feel a bit hot, and my throat hurts too.

sentences.formal: 那就早點回家休息吧，不要硬撐。
sentences.colloquial: 咁就早啲返屋企休息啦，唔好死頂。
sentences.en: Then go home early and rest — don't tough it out.

sentences.formal: 可是我還有一件急事沒做完。
sentences.colloquial: 但係我仲有一件急事未做完。
sentences.en: But I still have one urgent thing unfinished.

sentences.formal: 什麼事？我幫你跟進吧。
sentences.colloquial: 咩事呀？我幫你跟進啦。
sentences.en: What is it? I'll follow up for you.

sentences.formal: 五點之前要把報價單發給客戶，檔案已經放在共用資料夾。
sentences.colloquial: 五點之前要send張報價單畀個客，個file已經擺咗喺shared folder度。
sentences.en: The quotation has to go to the client by five — the file is already in the shared folder.

sentences.formal: 放心，交給我。你快點回去休息，記得看醫生。
sentences.colloquial: 放心，交畀我啦。你快啲返去休息，記住睇醫生。
sentences.en: Don't worry, leave it to me. Hurry home and rest — and remember to see a doctor.

sentences.formal: 謝謝你，明天有什麼事隨時打給我。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該晒你，聽日有咩事隨時打畀我。
sentences.en: Thanks so much — call me any time tomorrow if anything comes up.

sentences.formal: 不用擔心，早點康復！
sentences.colloquial: 唔使擔心，早啲好返啦！
sentences.en: Don't worry — get well soon!

sentences.formal: 天文台說今晚十點會發出八號風球。
sentences.colloquial: 天文台話今晚十點會掛八號波。
sentences.en: The Observatory says the T8 signal will go up at ten tonight.

sentences.formal: 真的嗎？那明天怎樣上班？
sentences.colloquial: 真係㗎？咁聽日返工點算呀？
sentences.en: Really? Then what happens with work tomorrow?

sentences.formal: 公司規定，八號風球期間辦公室關閉，全部人在家工作。
sentences.colloquial: 公司規定，八號風球期間office唔開，全部人WFH。
sentences.en: Company policy: while the T8 is up the office is closed and everyone works from home.

sentences.formal: 明白。那明天早上九點的客戶會議呢？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。咁聽朝九點個client meeting呢？
sentences.en: Got it. What about the nine o'clock client meeting tomorrow morning?

sentences.formal: 改為視像會議吧，我今晚發連結給大家。
sentences.colloquial: 改做video call啦，我今晚send個link畀大家。
sentences.en: Let's make it a video call — I'll send everyone the link tonight.

sentences.formal: 好。如果中午之前改發三號風球呢？
sentences.colloquial: 好。如果晏晝之前改咗三號呢？
sentences.en: Okay. And what if the signal drops to T3 before noon?

sentences.formal: 按照公司規定，三號風球發出後兩小時內要回到辦公室。
sentences.colloquial: 照公司規矩，改咗三號之後兩個鐘之內要返office。
sentences.en: By company rules, we have to be back in the office within two hours of the T3 going up.

sentences.formal: 明白了。記得早點回家，順便買一些食物。
sentences.colloquial: 明喇。記得早啲返屋企，買定啲嘢食睇門口。
sentences.en: Understood. Remember to head home early — and stock up on some food just in case.

sentences.formal: 對，超級市場現在一定很多人。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，超市而家一定好多人。
sentences.en: Right — the supermarket is bound to be packed right now.

sentences.formal: 好，明天網上見，注意安全！
sentences.colloquial: 好，聽日online見，小心啲呀！
sentences.en: See you online tomorrow then — stay safe!

sentences.formal: 你好，今天哪裡不舒服？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，今日邊度唔舒服呀？
sentences.en: Hello, what's bothering you today?

sentences.formal: 右下方的大牙，吃冰冷的東西特別痛。
sentences.colloquial: 右邊下面隻大牙，食凍嘢特別痛。
sentences.en: My lower right molar — it really hurts when I eat anything cold.

sentences.formal: 張開口讓我看看……這裡有一個蛀洞。
sentences.colloquial: 擘大口我睇睇……呢度有個蛀窿。
sentences.en: Open wide and let me see... there's a cavity here.

sentences.formal: 嚴重嗎？需要脫牙嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 嚴唔嚴重呀？使唔使剝牙呀？
sentences.en: Is it serious? Will the tooth have to come out?

sentences.formal: 不用，補牙就可以，不過要先照一張X光片。
sentences.colloquial: 唔使，補牙就得，不過要照張X光先。
sentences.en: No, a filling will do — but we need an X-ray first.

sentences.formal: 補牙會痛嗎？我有點害怕。
sentences.colloquial: 補牙痛唔痛㗎？我有啲驚。
sentences.en: Will the filling hurt? I'm a bit scared.

sentences.formal: 會先打麻醉針，過程基本上沒有感覺。
sentences.colloquial: 會打定麻醉針，過程基本上冇感覺嘅。
sentences.en: You'll get an anaesthetic injection first — you'll barely feel a thing.

sentences.formal: 好吧，那要多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 好啦，咁要幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: Alright. How much will it cost?

sentences.formal: 補一隻牙八百元，連洗牙一共一千二百元。
sentences.colloquial: 補一隻牙八百蚊，連埋洗牙一共一千二。
sentences.en: A filling is eight hundred dollars; with a cleaning it's one thousand two hundred in total.

sentences.formal: 好，一起做吧，長痛不如短痛！
sentences.colloquial: 好，一齊做埋佢啦，長痛不如短痛！
sentences.en: Okay, let's do both — better a short pain than a long one!

sentences.formal: 你好，請坐。先蓋着左眼，讀出最下面那一行字母。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，請坐。冚住左眼先，讀出最底嗰行字母。
sentences.en: Hello, have a seat. Cover your left eye and read the bottom row of letters.

sentences.formal: E……F……下面那些太模糊，看不清楚。
sentences.colloquial: E……F……下面嗰啲太朦，睇唔清楚。
sentences.en: E... F... the ones below are too blurry, I can't make them out.

sentences.formal: 你最近看手機會不會覺得眼睛容易累？
sentences.colloquial: 你最近睇手機會唔會覺得對眼好易攰呀？
sentences.en: Have your eyes been getting tired easily when you look at your phone lately?

sentences.formal: 會，晚上看東西還有點重影。
sentences.colloquial: 會呀，夜晚睇嘢仲有啲重影添。
sentences.en: Yes — and at night I even see a bit of double vision.

sentences.formal: 你的近視加深了，還有輕微散光。
sentences.colloquial: 你近視深咗，仲有少少散光。
sentences.en: Your short-sightedness has gotten worse, and there's mild astigmatism too.

sentences.formal: 加深了多少？
sentences.colloquial: 深咗幾多呀？
sentences.en: How much worse?

sentences.formal: 加深了五十度，現在左右眼都是四百度左右。
sentences.colloquial: 深咗五十度，而家左右眼都係四百度左右。
sentences.en: Up by fifty degrees — both eyes are now around four hundred.

sentences.formal: 那我要配一副新眼鏡了，鏡片要防藍光的。
sentences.colloquial: 咁我要配返副新眼鏡喇，鏡片要防藍光嗰隻。
sentences.en: Then I'll need new glasses — with blue-light-filtering lenses.

sentences.formal: 好，這款鏡框連鏡片一共一千三百元，三個工作天後取貨。
sentences.colloquial: 好，呢款鏡框連鏡片一共一千三百蚊，三個工作天後攞貨。
sentences.en: Sure. This frame with lenses comes to one thousand three hundred dollars, ready in three working days.

sentences.formal: 可以，順便給我一支眼鏡清潔劑。
sentences.colloquial: 得，順便畀支洗眼鏡水我啦。
sentences.en: Fine — and throw in a bottle of lens cleaner while you're at it.

sentences.formal: 你好，轉介信說你腰痛，持續多久了？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，轉介信話你腰痛，痛咗幾耐呀？
sentences.en: Hello — your referral letter says lower back pain. How long has it been going on?

sentences.formal: 大約三個星期，坐久了站起來特別痛。
sentences.colloquial: 大約三個禮拜，坐得耐企起身特別痛。
sentences.en: About three weeks. It's worst when I stand up after sitting a long time.

sentences.formal: 你的工作是不是需要長時間坐着？
sentences.colloquial: 你份工係咪要坐好長時間㗎？
sentences.en: Does your job involve sitting for long stretches?

sentences.formal: 是的，我做文職，每天對着電腦八九個小時。
sentences.colloquial: 係呀，我做文職，日日對住部電腦八九個鐘。
sentences.en: Yes, I do office work — eight or nine hours a day in front of a computer.

sentences.formal: 先趴在床上，我按這裡，痛就告訴我。
sentences.colloquial: 趴喺張床度先，我撳呢度，痛就話我知。
sentences.en: Lie face down on the bed. I'll press here — tell me if it hurts.

sentences.formal: 呀，就是那個位置！
sentences.colloquial: 呀，就係嗰個位！
sentences.en: Ah — that's exactly the spot!

sentences.formal: 是腰部肌肉勞損。我先幫你做熱敷和超聲波。
sentences.colloquial: 係腰部肌肉勞損。我幫你做熱敷同超聲波先。
sentences.en: It's a lower back muscle strain. I'll start you with heat therapy and ultrasound.

sentences.formal: 需要做多少次治療？
sentences.colloquial: 要做幾多次治療呀？
sentences.en: How many sessions will I need?

sentences.formal: 大約六次。另外教你三個伸展動作，每天在家做。
sentences.colloquial: 大約六次。另外教你三個伸展動作，日日喺屋企做。
sentences.en: About six. I'll also teach you three stretches to do at home every day.

sentences.formal: 好的，那我可以繼續跑步嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，咁我可唔可以繼續跑步呀？
sentences.en: Okay. Can I keep running in the meantime?

sentences.formal: 這兩星期先改為急步行，姿勢正確最重要。
sentences.colloquial: 呢兩個禮拜行快啲當運動先啦，姿勢正確最緊要。
sentences.en: Switch to brisk walking for the next two weeks — good posture matters most.

sentences.formal: 你好，請問可以預約接種流感疫苗嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，請問可唔可以預約打流感針呀？
sentences.en: Hello, could I book a flu vaccination?

sentences.formal: 可以。請問幾位？有沒有長者或小孩？
sentences.colloquial: 得呀。請問幾多位呀？有冇長者或者細路？
sentences.en: Certainly. How many people, and are there any seniors or children?

sentences.formal: 兩位，我和我媽媽，她今年六十五歲。
sentences.colloquial: 兩位，我同我媽咪，佢今年六十五歲。
sentences.en: Two — me and my mum. She's sixty-five this year.

sentences.formal: 六十五歲或以上有政府資助，帶身份證就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 六十五歲或以上有政府資助，帶身份證就得㗎喇。
sentences.en: Sixty-five and above get the government subsidy — just bring her ID card.

sentences.formal: 太好了。那我自己要多少錢？
sentences.colloquial: 咁就好喇。咁我自己要幾多錢呀？
sentences.en: That's great. And how much is it for me?

sentences.formal: 成人二百四十元。想約什麼時間？
sentences.colloquial: 大人二百四十蚊。想約幾點呀？
sentences.en: Two hundred forty dollars for adults. What time would you like?

sentences.formal: 星期六上午可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 禮拜六朝早得唔得呀？
sentences.en: Would Saturday morning work?

sentences.formal: 星期六上午十點半有空位，可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 禮拜六朝早十點半有位，得唔得？
sentences.en: There's a slot Saturday at half past ten in the morning. Does that suit you?

sentences.formal: 可以。打針之後有什麼要注意？
sentences.colloquial: 得。打完針之後有咩要注意呀？
sentences.en: Yes. Anything to watch out for after the jab?

sentences.formal: 留在診所觀察十五分鐘，當天不要做劇烈運動。
sentences.colloquial: 留喺診所觀察十五分鐘，當日唔好做劇烈運動。
sentences.en: Stay at the clinic for fifteen minutes' observation, and avoid strenuous exercise that day.

sentences.formal: 明白，謝謝你，星期六見。
sentences.colloquial: 明白，唔該晒，禮拜六見。
sentences.en: Understood, thank you. See you Saturday.

sentences.formal: 你好，請坐，今天覺得怎麼樣？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，請坐，今日覺得點呀？
sentences.en: Hello, have a seat. How are you feeling today?

sentences.formal: 最近常常喉嚨痛，口氣重，晚上又睡得不好。
sentences.colloquial: 最近成日喉嚨痛，口氣重，夜晚又瞓得唔好。
sentences.en: Lately I keep getting a sore throat, my breath is bad, and I sleep poorly at night.

sentences.formal: 伸出舌頭讓我看看……舌苔偏黃，你上火了。
sentences.colloquial: 伸條脷出嚟我睇睇……脷苔黃，你熱氣喇。
sentences.en: Stick out your tongue... the coating is yellowish. You've got too much internal heat.

sentences.formal: 難怪！我這星期吃了三次煎炸食物。
sentences.colloquial: 唔怪得啦！我今個禮拜食咗三次煎炸嘢。
sentences.en: No wonder! I've had deep-fried food three times this week.

sentences.formal: 讓我把脈……脈象偏快，還有沒有其他不舒服？
sentences.colloquial: 等我把吓脈……脈象快咗啲，仲有冇其他唔舒服？
sentences.en: Let me take your pulse... it's a little fast. Any other discomfort?

sentences.formal: 有時覺得口乾，喝多少水也沒有用。
sentences.colloquial: 有時覺得口乾，飲幾多水都冇用。
sentences.en: Sometimes my mouth feels dry, and no amount of water helps.

sentences.formal: 我開五劑清熱的藥，每天煎一劑，飯後喝。
sentences.colloquial: 我開五劑清熱嘅藥，每日煲一劑，食完飯飲。
sentences.en: I'll prescribe five doses of heat-clearing herbs — brew one dose a day and drink it after meals.

sentences.formal: 中藥太苦了，可以喝涼茶代替嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 中藥太苦喇，可唔可以飲涼茶代替呀？
sentences.en: Herbal medicine is so bitter — could I drink herbal tea instead?

sentences.formal: 廿四味太寒涼，不適合你，喝夏枯草就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 廿四味太寒涼，唔啱你，飲夏枯草就得。
sentences.en: Twenty-four-herb tea is too cooling for you — self-heal tea will do fine.

sentences.formal: 明白。那戒口方面呢？
sentences.colloquial: 明白。咁戒口方面呢？
sentences.en: I see. And what about foods to avoid?

sentences.formal: 這星期不要吃煎炸和辛辣食物，早點睡覺，比吃藥更重要。
sentences.colloquial: 今個禮拜唔好食煎炸同辣嘢，早啲瞓，仲緊要過食藥。
sentences.en: No fried or spicy food this week — and going to bed early matters more than any medicine.

sentences.formal: 好的，我盡量十一點前睡。
sentences.colloquial: 好啦，我盡量十一點前瞓。
sentences.en: Alright, I'll try to be asleep before eleven.

sentences.formal: 你好，先登記。哪裡不舒服？
sentences.colloquial: 你好，登記先。邊度唔舒服呀？
sentences.en: Hello, let's register you first. What's wrong?

sentences.formal: 我剛才在家滑倒，手腕又腫又痛，動不了。
sentences.colloquial: 我頭先喺屋企跣低，手腕又腫又痛，郁唔到。
sentences.en: I just slipped at home. My wrist is swollen and painful, and I can't move it.

sentences.formal: 讓我看看……有沒有撞到頭？
sentences.colloquial: 我睇睇……有冇撞到頭呀？
sentences.en: Let me have a look... did you hit your head?

sentences.formal: 沒有，只是用手撐了一下地。
sentences.colloquial: 冇，淨係用手撐咗一下地。
sentences.en: No, I just broke the fall with my hand.

sentences.formal: 先幫你量血壓和體溫，等一下分流站會叫你的名字。
sentences.colloquial: 幫你度血壓同探熱先，陣間分流站會叫你個名。
sentences.en: I'll take your blood pressure and temperature first. The triage station will call your name shortly.

sentences.formal: 請問要等多久？痛得很厲害。
sentences.colloquial: 請問要等幾耐呀？痛到好犀利。
sentences.en: How long will the wait be? It hurts a lot.

sentences.formal: 你被分為次緊急，現在人不多，大約一小時左右。
sentences.colloquial: 你分咗做次緊急，而家唔算多人，大約一個鐘度。
sentences.en: You've been triaged as semi-urgent. It's not busy right now — around an hour.

sentences.formal: 好吧。可以先給我一點止痛藥嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 好啦。可唔可以畀啲止痛藥我先呀？
sentences.en: Alright. Could I get some painkillers in the meantime?

sentences.formal: 醫生看過才可以開藥，我先給你一個冰袋敷着。
sentences.colloquial: 醫生睇咗先開得藥，我畀個冰袋你敷住先。
sentences.en: Medication can only be prescribed after the doctor sees you — I'll give you an ice pack for now.

sentences.formal: 謝謝。急症室的收費是多少？
sentences.colloquial: 唔該。急症室收幾多錢㗎？
sentences.en: Thanks. How much does A&E cost?

sentences.formal: 持香港身份證是一百八十元，稍後到繳費處付款。
sentences.colloquial: 有香港身份證係一百八十蚊，陣間去繳費處畀錢。
sentences.en: One hundred eighty dollars with a Hong Kong ID card — you pay at the cashier later.

sentences.formal: 你好，我想更改覆診時間。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，我想改覆診時間。
sentences.en: Hi, I'd like to change my follow-up appointment.

sentences.formal: 好的，請問貴姓？原本約了哪一天？
sentences.colloquial: 好呀，請問貴姓？本來約咗邊日呀？
sentences.en: Sure. May I have your surname, and which day was the original booking?

sentences.formal: 我姓林，原本約了下星期三上午十一點。
sentences.colloquial: 我姓林，本來約咗下個禮拜三朝早十一點。
sentences.en: My surname is Lam. It was next Wednesday at eleven in the morning.

sentences.formal: 林先生，找到了。想改到什麼時候？
sentences.colloquial: 林生，搵到喇。想改到幾時呀？
sentences.en: Mr Lam, found it. When would you like to move it to?

sentences.formal: 那天公司突然要開會，可以改到星期五嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 嗰日公司突然要開會，可唔可以改到禮拜五呀？
sentences.en: A meeting came up at work that day — could we move it to Friday?

sentences.formal: 星期五上午已經滿了，下午三點半可以嗎？
sentences.colloquial: 禮拜五朝早已經滿晒，下晝三點半得唔得？
sentences.en: Friday morning is fully booked. Would half past three in the afternoon work?

sentences.formal: 可以，就三點半吧。
sentences.colloquial: 得，就三點半啦。
sentences.en: That works — half past three it is.

sentences.formal: 好，已經幫你改了，記得帶覆診卡和身份證。
sentences.colloquial: 好，幫你改咗喇，記得帶覆診卡同身份證。
sentences.en: Done, I've changed it for you. Remember to bring your appointment card and ID.

sentences.formal: 如果臨時來不了怎麼辦？
sentences.colloquial: 如果臨時嚟唔到點算呀？
sentences.en: What if something comes up and I can't make it?

sentences.formal: 最少提前一天打電話通知我們就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 最少早一日打電話通知我哋就得㗎喇。
sentences.en: Just phone us at least a day in advance.

sentences.formal: 明白，麻煩你了，星期五見。
sentences.colloquial: 明白，唔該晒，禮拜五見。
sentences.en: Got it, thanks for your help. See you Friday.

sentences.formal: 你好，歡迎！第一次來，我先帶你熟悉一下環境。
sentences.colloquial: 你好，歡迎歡迎！第一次嚟，我帶你熟悉吓環境先。
sentences.en: Hi, welcome! Since it's your first time, let me show you around first.

sentences.formal: 謝謝，我完全是新手，主要想減肚子。
sentences.colloquial: 唔該，我完全係新手，主要想減個肚腩。
sentences.en: Thanks. I'm a complete beginner — mainly I want to lose my belly.

sentences.formal: 沒問題，先在跑步機上熱身十分鐘。
sentences.colloquial: 冇問題，喺跑步機度熱身十分鐘先。
sentences.en: No problem. Start with ten minutes' warm-up on the treadmill.

sentences.formal: 速度應該調到多快？
sentences.colloquial: 個速度應該較到幾快呀？
sentences.en: How fast should I set the speed?

sentences.formal: 調到六左右，走到微微出汗就可以。
sentences.colloquial: 較到六度左右，行到微微出汗就得。
sentences.en: Around six — walking until you break a light sweat is enough.

sentences.formal: 好……熱身完之後做什麼？
sentences.colloquial: 好……熱完身之後做啲咩呀？
sentences.en: Okay... and after the warm-up, what's next?

sentences.formal: 教你三個基本動作：深蹲、划船和平板支撐。
sentences.colloquial: 教你三個基本動作：深蹲、划船同埋平板支撐。
sentences.en: I'll teach you three basics: squats, rows and the plank.

sentences.formal: 深蹲會不會傷膝蓋？
sentences.colloquial: 深蹲會唔會傷膝頭哥呀？
sentences.en: Won't squats hurt my knees?

sentences.formal: 姿勢正確就不會，膝蓋不要超過腳尖，我在旁邊看着你。
sentences.colloquial: 姿勢啱就唔會，膝頭唔好超過腳趾尖，我喺隔籬睇住你。
sentences.en: Not if your form is right — keep your knees behind your toes, and I'll be right beside you.

sentences.formal: 明白了。一星期應該來幾次？
sentences.colloquial: 明白喇。一個禮拜應該嚟幾多次呀？
sentences.en: Got it. How many times a week should I come?

sentences.formal: 初期兩三次就足夠，肌肉需要時間休息。
sentences.colloquial: 初期兩三次就夠，啲肌肉要時間唞。
sentences.en: Two or three times is plenty at first — muscles need time to rest.

sentences.formal: 好，希望夏天之前見到成果！
sentences.colloquial: 好，希望夏天之前見到成果啦！
sentences.en: Great — here's hoping I see results before summer!
